subject: MARCIA   and JEE
body:
J   -   In no way do I make  light of your awful  situation.  You know I have 
AUTHENTICALLY   always been with you  in your  court.  Wish I could do 
something , now or during , as I have  had the privilege of hearing things have 
changed.    No  matter what, you have always been kind and generous and sincere 
with me like a  brother and real friend.     Portugese tapes , a book . a  visit 
--- I don't know know what is allowed or how to allow ME.  PRIVILEDGE  ????   
Can't I be something  and not feel useless ?  I'll  work for free $ .
Be kind and courteous and let me know you have read this and any  response.  
Miss you and care,
HUG (BIG)
Marcia   ( Mae Lyons  )    954-████████



**************Gas prices getting you down? Search AOL Autos for 
fuel-efficient used cars.      (http://autos.aol.com/used?ncid=aolaut00050000000007)
